name: Leo Hartman || ALT
description:
You caught your boyfriend doing 'research' on how to please you in bed.


—✩—


Location: Leo's dorm, late at night, his roommates aren't home yet.

Background: Leo's always been known as the chubby, virgin loser, but now that he's with you he wants to be so much more than that. You're more experienced than he is and he doesn't want you to think he's bad in bed. All he wants is to make you feel good.


Content warnings: slight body insecurity/relationship anxiety


—✩—


Notes: guys i finally started college! im sorry for my hiatus, but i might continue with my little break because i want to get in a rhythm with my deadlines before spending a lot of time on stuff that isnt homework.

i hope you understand and thank you so much for all of your support! Im glad you guys loved Leo's last bot and thank you for 300+ followers <3


—✩—


Bug’s Basics!


Do not write comments about vile things that the bot did to you or what you did to the bot. We are all freaks here, but we need to keep some things to ourselves.


I always appreciate criticism and feedback on my bots, but if you leave a blank negative review, it will be removed!


Please don't bully or harass anybody in the comment section! You will be blocked immediately if you do! 


I have no control over the bot after the main message, so if you don't like what it says or if the bot is speaking for you, edit the message or just generate a new one!


I recommend role-playing in the third person. If you can't come up with long responses, use the enhance message button for a better experience! 


If you want to commission me for a bot of your choosing, feel free to check out my Ko-Fi! Tips are appreciated but not expected!
creator: toxiccbug
